admin.title: Administrative Steps
admin.subtitle: Complete your essential steps
admin.congrats: Congratulations! All your steps are completed!

nas.title: Social Insurance Number (SIN)
nas.description: Must be done within the first 3 days. Visit Service Canada.

ramq.title: Health Insurance Card (RAMQ)
ramq.description: 3-month waiting period. Register as soon as you arrive.

bank.title: Open a Bank Account
bank.description: Open an account at a Canadian bank (TD, RBC, Desjardins...)

license.title: Quebec Driver's License
license.description: Exchange your foreign license at SAAQ within 6 months.

housing.title: Housing Lease Registration
housing.description: Find housing that suits your needs in Quebec.

stations.title: Stations and stops
stations.permissionMsg: Enable location to find nearby stops.

climate.title: Climate & Weather
climate.subtitle: Quebec Seasonal Guide
climate.winterDesc: December to March. Temperatures between -30°C and -5°C. Heavy snow.
climate.springDesc: April to May. Temperatures between 5°C and 15°C. Frequent rain.
climate.summerDesc: June to August. Temperatures between 20°C and 35°C. Hot and humid.
climate.fallDesc: September to November. Temperatures between 5°C and 20°C. Colorful foliage.

clothing.cold: Winter coat, insulated boots, tuque, scarf, mittens, thermal underwear
clothing.cool: Warm coat, winter boots, tuque, scarf and gloves
clothing.mild: Light jacket or raincoat, warm sweater
clothing.warm: T-shirt, shorts or light dress, sunglasses

welcome.title: Welcome to Premiers Pas
welcome.description: Premiers Pas is an app designed to help newcomers to Quebec easily integrate into their new life.
welcome.point1: The app is available in French, English and Spanish
welcome.point2: All information is adapted to your city
welcome.point3: No connection required for some features

navigation.title: How to navigate
navigation.description: The app is organized in modules accessible from the home screen.
navigation.point1: Home: access all modules from the main grid
navigation.point2: Guides: this user manual you are reading right now
navigation.point3: Settings: change your language, city and app theme
navigation.point4: Each module has a ← button to go back to home

admin.title: Steps Module
admin.description: This module guides you through the essential administrative steps upon arrival in Quebec.
admin.point1: SIN: your social insurance number, essential for working
admin.point3: Bank: open a bank account in Canada
admin.point4: Check each completed step to track your progress

transport.title: Transport Module
transport.description: This module helps you use public transit in your city.
transport.point1: Fares: check ticket prices for your network
transport.point2: Guides: practical tips for using the bus
transport.point3: Itineraries: plan your trips via Google Maps
transport.point4: Stations: find the nearest stops to you

climate.title: Climate Module
climate.description: This module informs you about the weather and seasons in Quebec.
climate.point1: Current temperature of your city in real time
climate.point2: Clothing advice adapted to the temperature
climate.point4: Winters can drop to -30°C, be prepared!

health.title: Health Module
health.description: This module helps you navigate the Quebec health system.
health.point1: RAMQ: info on your health insurance and waiting period
health.point2: CLSC: find the nearest community health center
health.point3: Clinic: locate a walk-in clinic near you

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary Module
vocabulary.description: This module teaches you Quebec expressions to better integrate.
vocabulary.point1: Browse expressions by category: transport, food, emotions...
vocabulary.point2: Use search to find an expression quickly
vocabulary.point3: Add your favorite expressions to favorites with the star ⭐
vocabulary.point4: Definitions and examples are available in your language

daily.title: Daily Life Module
daily.description: This module helps you find essential services and discover your city.
daily.point1: GPS services: find nearby grocery stores, pharmacies, banks and restaurants
daily.point2: Click on a service to open it in Google Maps
daily.point3: Places to discover: explore the historic sites of your city
daily.point4: Click on a place to get directions in Google Maps

settings.title: Settings Module
settings.description: This module lets you customize your experience in the app.
settings.point1: Language: change the app to French, English or Spanish
settings.point2: City: change your city to adapt the information
settings.point3: Theme: enable dark mode for a better night experience
